title: Unify Options type across csvcontract, jsoncontract, excelcontract
description: Options struct with TopN/MaxTracked/MaxSampleRows and identical accessor methods is duplicated in three packages. Consider embedding or reusing profile.Options.

title: Unify profile.FieldProfile and contract.FieldProfile
description: Two FieldProfile types with slightly different fields (TotalCount vs SampleSize). The mapping is explicit but creates maintenance surface. Consider merging into one type in contract/ with both fields.
